children.text: the terms “foreign”, “direct investment”, “international investment”, “United States”, “business enterprise”, “foreign person”, and “United States person” have the meanings given those terms in ; andsection 3102 of this title
the term “foreign direct investment in the United States” means direct investment by foreign persons in any business enterprise that is a United States person.
